faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Tremont?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted, EPA-approved treatments and professional protective equipment to safely eliminate hornets without endangering your family, pets, or neighbors. Our technicians are trained in safe removal techniques specific to Bronx residential buildings.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have hornets or wasps in Tremont?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than wasps, typically black and white or brown and yellow, and build large, papery, enclosed nests often found in trees, under eaves, or in attics. If you see large stinging insects or a basketball-sized nest on your Tremont property, contact us immediately for professional identification and removal.
